# Taskify

> Hyperlocal task marketplace connecting Arlington Heights and Buffalo Grove, IL neighbors for lawn care, errands, moving help, pet care and more.

Taskify lets homeowners post small tasks and pay verified local helpers (including young neighbors with parental consent) directly. Payment is coordinated off-app between neighbors.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Overview of Taskify and how the community marketplace works.
- [Browse Tasks](/tasks): Search and filter open tasks in Arlington Heights and Buffalo Grove.
- [Post a Task](/post-task): Describe a task and budget so neighbors can apply.
- [Features](/features): How Taskify works, trust and safety, and supported task categories.
- [Contact](/contact): Get in touch and join the mailing list.
- [Terms](/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/privacy): Privacy policy, including face verification data handling.
